name: Stir-Fry Beef with Peppers & Onion
recipeIngredient: 1 Onion, large, halved and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow nonmetal dish, combine 1 tablespoon oil, soy sauce, sherry, water, cornstarch, sugar, and garlic. Add the steak strips.
2. Heat the remaining tablespoon oil in a wok or nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add peppers, onion, and mushrooms; stir-fry for 3-5 minutes until tender-crisp. Remove and set aside.
3. Add the undrained steak to the wok; stir-fry for 2 minutes until no longer pink. Return the vegetables to the wok; stir-fry until heated through. Serve over rice.
